column1: Hi, this is a quick note to remember to buy milk, bread, and eggs on the way home. Also, I need to call my sister at 7 PM for her birthday.
Meeting notes for the VoxNote project. We discussed the new pricing page and decided to go with a violet color scheme. John will handle the backend integration by Friday.
I have an idea for a new feature. Let's add an AI chat where users can ask questions about their own recordings. This would be part of the Pro plan.
